query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN confidenceScore >= 70 THEN 'High (70+)'
    WHEN confidenceScore >= 50 THEN 'Medium (50-69)'
    WHEN confidenceScore >= 30 THEN 'Low (30-49)'
    ELSE 'Fallback (<30)'
  END as quality,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM atis_card_understanding
GROUP BY quality
ORDER BY count DESC
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zdYySmWxto697z.f7331094e4e6 --database 8WaJog2pAVrGepmXoS2wYU --execute SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN confidenceScore >= 70 THEN 'High (70+)'
    WHEN confidenceScore >= 50 THEN 'Medium (50-69)'
    WHEN confidenceScore >= 30 THEN 'Low (30-49)'
    ELSE 'Fallback (<30)'
  END as quality,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM atis_card_understanding
GROUP BY quality
ORDER BY count DESC
